title: Regulatory Redistribution in the Market for Health Insurance

data.sample_filter: workersB != 0 & childpresent != 0 & parentfirmsize != 0 & !actyear %in% c(1993, 1994, 1995) & actyear < 1998 & parentsmallfirm == 1 & !state_fips %in% c(25, 34, 21, 33)

construct_vars: df$t <- dplyr::case_when(df$actyear == 1987 ~ 1, df$actyear == 1988 ~ 2, df$actyear == 1989 ~ 3, df$actyear == 1990 ~ 4, df$actyear == 1991 ~ 5, df$actyear == 1992 ~ 6, df$actyear == 1996 ~ 7, df$actyear == 1997 ~ 8, TRUE ~ NA_real_)

notes: Stata TWFE: xi: reg priv_ins_cov_supp Post_avg i.actyear i.state_fips kid* i.superregion*femhead i.superregion*i.black i.superregion*poverty_percent i.educ_category i.workersB i.ownershp i.householdocc1990. Round 4 EXACT MATCH: two fixes — (1) include all 8 actyear values (1987-1992, 1996, 1997, N=127554 not 96359); (2) add femhead+black+poverty_percent main effects (xi: i.A*B generates B main effect for both continuous and i.B factor). With 6-year sample, adding main effects worsened gap; with full 8-year sample, both fixes together give exact match (0.00%). CS-NT also improved: -0.12429 vs Stata -0.12480 (0.4% gap). TWFE event study: collinear (3 treated states, single cohort) — skipped. BJS: state×year panel with first_stage controls, SEs ~0.03-0.05. Standalone script: id47_script.R.
